visa_types.name: Online Visa Application Form
visa_types.overview:
Applications need to be registered online on the Application Portal Norway (https://forms.udi.no/en/)
The cover letter and the supporting documents are to be submitted at the Norway visa application Centre. For more information on documents required please refer to below checklist.
Please click here to be directed to the checklist (https://www.norway.no/en/south-africa/services-info/visitors-visa-res-permit/visitors-visa/#necessary-doc)
visa_types.full_text:
Applications need to be registered online on the Application Portal Norway (https://forms.udi.no/en/)
The cover letter and the supporting documents are to be submitted at the Norway visa application Centre. For more information on documents required please refer to below checklist.
Please click here to be directed to the checklist (https://www.norway.no/en/south-africa/services-info/visitors-visa-res-permit/visitors-visa/#necessary-doc)
